data.title: NAIC announces 2026 committee leaders, prioritizing collaboration to tackle key insurance issues.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, the 2026 committee leadership of the National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC) was revealed, showcasing the organization's dedication to teamwork and harmonization in tackling the issues and chances influencing the sector. This move underscores the NAIC's commitment to unity and strategic planning for a productive year ahead.

data.title: WellQor celebrates 10 years of teletherapy, offering strong outcomes and high satisfaction. One of the largest practices in the USA.
data.description: A psychology practice based in Melville, NY, recently celebrated its 10-year anniversary. WellQor, known for its clinical leadership and operations across multiple states, specializes in providing care via telehealth. The practice boasts strong outcomes and high levels of patient satisfaction, making it one of the largest establishments of its kind in the country. The milestone was marked on January 13, 2026, showcasing the success and growth of the practice over the past decade.

data.description: In San Diego and Seoul, South Korea, on January 13, 2026, Rakuten Medical, Inc. and LOTTE Biologics revealed the signing of a significant biopharmaceutical contract manufacturing deal at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco. This agreement aims to enhance the capabilities of Rakuten.

data.title: Novel follows Ray Mundo, a Mexican American teen at elite prep school, shines light on identity and privilege. 25.7% US children are Hispanic/Latino.
data.description: Meet Ray Mundo, a Mexican American teenager who recently obtained a scholarship to attend a prestigious preparatory school. According to the United States Census Bureau's data from 2020, around 25.7% of the youth population in the country identifies as Hispanic or Latino. This statistic showcases the diverse backgrounds of children in the United States and highlights the importance of educational opportunities for individuals like Ray Mundo.

data.title: FDA grants Amplifi Vascular Breakthrough Device status & CMS Category B for Amplifi Vein Dilation System.
data.description: Major news in the medical field as Amplifi Vascular, Inc. has received Breakthrough Device Designation and a Category B assignment from the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services for their Amplifi Vein Dilation System. This development, announced on January 13, 2026, is set to revolutionize dialysis access. The breakthrough status signifies the high impact and potential benefits of the system. The Amplifi Vein Dilation System is poised to greatly enhance dialysis procedures, benefiting a large number of patients who rely on these treatments. This recognition from CMS highlights the importance and effectiveness of this innovative medical device.

data.title: Taylor Garvey joins LISA Board, promoted to Managing Director at AIR Asset Management; effective January 2026.
data.description: In Chicago on January 13, 2026, AIR Asset Management (AIR) revealed Taylor Garvey's appointment as a Board Member of the Life Insurance Settlement Association (LISA) and elevation to Managing Director at AIR. This promotion is set to take effect in January 2026.

data.title: Liberty Broadband Corporation in Englewood, CO will conduct quarterly Q&A conference call.
data.description: In Englewood, Colorado, Liberty Broadband Corporation will be hosting a quarterly Q&A conference call. The call is expected to provide insights into the company's performance and strategies. This communication platform allows stakeholders to ask questions regarding Liberty Broadband's operations and financials. The event is crucial for investors as it offers an opportunity to gain a deeper understanding of the company's quarterly results and future outlook. Liberty Broadband Corporation aims to enhance transparency and investor relations through this interactive session.

data.title: Brookfield Renewable to issue C$500 million in green bonds with 5.204% interest, due Jan. 15, 2056.
data.description: Brookfield Renewable, a leading renewable energy company, declared on Jan. 13, 2026, that they will be releasing C$500 million in Series 20 Notes. The notes are set to mature on Jan. 15, 2056, with an annual interest rate of 5.204%. Brookfield Renewable is listed on the NYSE under ticker symbols BEP and BEPC, as well as on the TSX with ticker symbols BEP.UN and BEPC.

data.title: GFL Environmental Inc. prices oversubscribed private offering of $1 billion in senior notes due 2034.
data.description: In Vaughan, ON on January 13, 2026, GFL Environmental Inc. disclosed the pricing details of US$1 billion worth of senior notes due 2034. The transaction, involving 5.500% interest on the Notes, was oversubscribed. GFL, listed on NYSE as GFL and TSX as GFL, successfully completed this financial move.

data.title: Veracity debuts Metabolic Power Protein, a safe, metabolism-boosting protein.
data.description: A new product, Metabolic Power Protein, has been launched by Veracity in New York. This innovative protein is specifically designed to enhance metabolism without any harmful side effects. The product aims to provide a smarter solution for individuals looking to boost their metabolism.

data.title: GCI Liberty, Inc. announced its fourth quarter earnings release and conference call in Englewood, Colorado.
data.description: ENGLEWOOD, Colorado - GCI Liberty, Inc. has revealed plans for their upcoming Fourth Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call. The event will be held to discuss the financial results for the final quarter of the year. Shareholders and interested parties can anticipate a detailed overview of the company's performance during this period. The conference call will allow for further insights into the numbers that will be disclosed, including key figures such as revenue, profits, and any pertinent financial indicators. This announcement signals a significant update for stakeholders eager to assess GCI Liberty, Inc.'s recent financial standing.

data.title: Sports thriller explores college football's impact on athletes off the field. SACRAMENTO, Calif., Jan. 13, 2026 - Delves into the dark undercurrents of fame and identity off the field.
data.description: In Sacramento, California on January 13, 2026, a group of promising young football players are showcased in a story that explores their struggle to establish their identity beyond the football field. Transitioning from the excitement of Friday night games to navigating million-dollar revenue opportunities, these college athletes are changing the perceptions of how society views them. Their impact goes beyond the game, influencing consumer behavior and even determining their sense of community and connection.

data.title: Senate bill grants Dogecoin (DOGE) Bitcoin-like status, causing DOGE and Shiba Inu (SHIB) to rally 5%. DOGE classified as commodity, not security.
data.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) and Shiba Inu (SHIB) saw a 5% increase in value following the release of a draft bill by the Senate Banking Committee. The bill proposes to classify DOGE as a commodity rather than a security, giving it the same regulatory treatment as Bitcoin (BTC). This move comes after the introduction of a key provision stating that DOGE qualifies for "non-ancillary asset" status due to the presence of a Dogecoin ETF trading on a major exchange before January 1. Consequently, DOGE is now exempt from SEC securities rules and registration requirements, allowing exchanges like Coinbase to list it without any restrictions.

data.title: Robex Resources receives final court approval for merger with Predictive Discovery Limited in Québec, acquiring all outstanding Robex shares.
data.description: In Quebec City on January 13, 2026, Robex Resources Inc. declared it received a final order from the Quebec Superior Court (Commercial Division) endorsing the merger agreement with Predictive Discovery Limited. The arrangement involves Predictive, via its wholly-owned subsidiary, acquiring all outstanding common shares of Robex. This acquisition will be carried out through a statutory plan of arrangement under the Business Corporations Act (Québec).

data.title: Macrophage Activation Syndrome market to grow at 24.7% CAGR in 6MM during 2025-2034, driven by new therapies.
data.description: The market for macrophage activation syndrome is on a consistent rise, propelled by an expanding array of treatment choices, better survival rates, and the introduction of novel therapies like targeting SIRP-α/β1/γ (ELA026) and Granulocyte-macrophage Colony-stimulating Factor (GM-CSF). This growth trend is reflected in significant market numbers showing an increase in the demand for innovative treatment solutions and the incorporation of advanced therapy options in addressing the condition.
